description: Composition Brown shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, long sleeves, full front buttoned placket, patch pocket on the left chest, stitch detailing, branding embroidered on the left pocket and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Hand or machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This brown shirt from scullers adds a big dose of style to your casual look. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this shirt, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with formal trousers and leather shoes. Model statistics The product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
